subject: Don't extract particles if close to the edge of the micrograph
body:
Hey mate,

Sometimes we work with very large particles which also need a large box. If 
a large portion of the box is outside the micrograph, reconstructions don't 
always work great due to no Fourier information in them as box padding 
isn't the greatest. Anyway, it would be cool to see an option that 
automates this somewhat in WARP. Perhaps a button "don't extract if on 
micrograph edge". I can always write a little script to ignore the 
particles close the micrograph edge in in the star files, but it a more 
user friendly option might be a good idea. Anyway, its just a suggestion. 
The software is great man, we are using it to stream straight off the 
microscope to assess how our data collections are going, its a real game 
changer in my opinion. Good stuff!

cheers

matt B
